translations.introduction.0:
Hello stranger, welcome to TRACES.
I’ll be your companion memory
translations.artwork.hint.explore: Use the joystick to explore the artwork and other’s testimonies
translations.session.quit.title: Leave the experience?
translations.session.quit.message: You will loose all your progress and go back to the home screen.
translations.session.quit.iddle.title: Still there?
translations.session.quit.iddle.message: You have been inactive for a while, you will be sent back to the home screen.
